content:
Dear all,

The 15th meeting of the Southern and Midlands Logic Seminar will take place on Wednesday 24 June at University College London, UK.

The speakers will be:

  • Ralph Sarkis (UCL) - Quantitative Diagrammatic Axiomatisation of Relative Entropy
  • Katya Piotrovskaya (UCL) - From Phase Semantics to Base-extension Semantics (and back)
  • Madhumitha Krishnakumar (Queen Mary) - Counting Small Subhypergraphs
  • Paaras Padhiar (Birmingham) - Second-order intuitionistic tense logic
  • David Gao (Oxford) - Graphical Algebraic Geometry: From Ideals and Varieties to Quantum Calculi
  • Marc Thatcher (Sussex) - The Problem of Observable Value in Interaction Nets

More info can be found here: https://leolob.ski/SMLS/smls15.

Everyone is welcome to attend (although note that the attendance is in person only).
